title: stelis decipiens
intro: Stelis decipiens, also known as the False Orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the orchid family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Stelis decipiens include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote healing of injuries. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or ointments, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues.
